title: Phase 8: Applications
description: Tactical radio features: messaging, position sharing, waypoints, SOS, presence, check-in, range testing, groups. Exit criteria: all P0 applications working, SOS priority handling works, group messaging works.
close_reason: All Phase 8 resources complete: presence/heartbeat (se0p), messaging (fnma), SOS beacon (mkk4); 1371 Python tests passing.
